notes: The checked-in signed registry is sufficient for bootstrap if listed endpoints are reachable.
Optional HTTPS mirrors may publish the same signed registry.
Mirror hosts are not trust authorities.
Discovery-level verification does not grant validator authority.
This public observer testnet is resettable and non-economic.
Controlled/public testnet cryptographic gate now targets pq-mldsa-v1; legacy Ed25519 seed registry signatures are dev/local transitional only.
